Habit OS

Track tasks daily, tick them off, and see the month move in real time.

Built as a clean React tracker inspired by your reference images, but with a sharper dashboard, mobile-friendly layout, and database persistence.

Monthly gridOffline cacheNeon env slot ready
Total habits5
Conquered0
Completed0
Progress0.0%

Backend note

Neon database is wired through the backend.

The app now loads and saves habit state through a Postgres API, with local cache fallback if the backend is unavailable.

Future habits

Weak List

Keep the things you want to improve later, separate from today's tracker.

Conquered

Habits you have already carried for a long time.

No conquered habits yet.

Move a long-running daily habit here when it no longer needs daily tracking.
